Seeking a motivated Actuarial Analyst to support our Workers’ Compensation pricing team. This role offers the opportunity to work on meaningful business problems and collaborate with a fun, engaged and highly talented team. You will support the development of state rate indications, pricing large accounts, building and maintaining monitoring tools, and assisting in research to support pricing strategies. You will apply actuarial methodologies to assess rate adequacy at both an aggregate and seg…

Most early-career actuarial roles give you a narrow view of the business. At GPW and Associates, Inc. (GPW), you'll gain exposure to the bigger picture and work directly with experienced actuaries to serve clients across a variety of industries and insurance programs. As an Actuarial Analyst, you will gain hands-on experience with reviewing and compiling large quantities of client data in support of actuarial reserving analyses. jobs.summary: Description SUMMARY This role sits at the intersection of core actuarial pricing work, analytical problem‑solving, and process enablement. jobSearchLinks.whatToWatch: Prioritize postings mentioning claims trend, pricing, rate filing, risk adjustment, ACA, Medicare Advantage, Medicaid, SQL, and dashboarding.
Prioritize postings mentioning valuation, reserves, annuities, asset adequacy, reinsurance, mortality, assumption governance, and model validation.
This is likely the easiest transition title for a Python/SQL/data-science profile. Watch for insurance data, reporting automation, and model support tasks.
Watch how job posts describe pricing support, reserve movement, loss ratio, experience study, and management reporting.

sources.name: NAIC Life Actuarial Task Force
sources.use: Life valuation, annuity assumptions, reinsurance, asset adequacy, complex assets, and regulatory development.

sources.name: NAIC Health Actuarial Task Force
sources.use: Health actuarial regulation, rate review, claims trend, Medicare/Medicaid, and risk adjustment issues.

sources.use: Policy-facing actuarial updates, public statements, and practice-area commentary.

sources.use: Life insurance, annuity, longevity, valuation, and policy topics.

sources.use: SOA research, profession updates, and actuarial industry announcements.
